##LOCALITY=Arabia District, Pershing County, Nevada, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=University of Arizona Mineral Museum
##DESCRIPTION=Yellow-brown coarsely fibrous massive, intimately mixed with mimetite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R050546
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Pb_1.33_Fe_0.47_Ca_0.20_)(Sb^5+^_1.97_As^5+^_0.03_)O_7_ ; (darker phase, with trace amounts of Na)    (Pb_4.07_Ca_0.92_Fe_0.01_)((As_2.97_Sb_0.03_)O_4_)_3_Cl_1.00_ (lighter phase = mimetite)
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
